name: Mytrex Health Technologies, Inc.
summary: Mytrex Health Technologies, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells non-woven materials and special medical supplies in Taiwan and internationally. It provides electrostatic filtration materials for medical and industrial mask media, and other filtration applications; and composite nonwoven products for coolant and air filter, vacuum filter bag, HEPA and cabin filter, water filtration compound material applications. The company also offers thermal insulation products for glove, sock, shoe, hat, clothing material, and mask insulation material applications; and linen laundry and leasing, logistic, and medical supplies for hospitals. Mytrex Health Technologies, Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
